name: primary_key
description: Stage identity. Synthesized as '<site_id>|<iso_utc_timestamp>' by miaproc.cli._prepare_processed_for_stage when run-bigquery-silver writes to BigQuery. Uniqueness on this column is equivalent to (site_id, timestamp) uniqueness by construction; validate_stage_table aborts the writeback if either is violated.

name: site_id
description: Site identifier. Per-row category value: under the M24 all-data grouped CLI, --group-column site_id partitions the all-data BigQuery read into per-category silver runs; each per-category run uses its group's category as the stage-identity site_id, and the per-group silver stage frames are concatenated into one stacked payload before silver writeback. Legacy single-site programmatic callers may still pass an explicit site_id to the package-level helpers.

name: timestamp
description: Half-hour observation timestamp in UTC, regularized to the continuous 30-minute grid by miaproc.eddy.time.regularize_time_grid. Equal to DateTime when staged.

name: DateTime
description: Tz-aware half-hour timestamp. The legacy stage-1 / stage-2 join key the package was built around; preserved alongside `timestamp` so downstream consumers reading by either name keep working. run-bigquery-gold reads silver back from BigQuery on this column.

name: NEE
description: Net ecosystem exchange (renamed from co2_flux). Pre-backend: rows where qc_co2_flux=2, P_RAIN>0, or |x-mean| > 3*sigma have been masked but no gap filling has run yet.

name: QC_NEE
description: Renamed from qc_co2_flux. Carried through silver so an auditor can re-derive the QC mask state.

name: Tair
description: Air temperature in degrees C (unit-converted from K by miaproc.eddy.qc.convert_units). Renamed from air_temperature.

name: USTAR
description: Friction velocity in m/s. Renamed from u_star (or u.). Drives the dynamic-u* plateau estimator (Decision 009) on the gold side.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit in hPa. Pass-through; driver for MDS gap filling and Lasslop partitioning on the gold side.

name: Rg
description: Incoming shortwave radiation in W/m^2 (renamed from SWIN_1_1_1). Pass-through driver for gold.

name: P_RAIN
description: Half-hour precipitation in mm (renamed from P_RAIN_1_1_1). Already used to mask flux rows; pass-through into silver for audit.

name: rH
description: Source relative humidity in percent (renamed from RH_1_1_1). Source rH is never renamed; if a divergent normalized duplicate is present, that duplicate becomes rH_norm_s.

name: rH_norm_s
description: Silver-stage normalized/derived relative-humidity column created only when the M28 payload builder sees a divergent duplicate rH. Source rH is never renamed; equivalent duplicate rH columns are suppressed, while divergent humidity information is preserved here for BigQuery-compatible unique column names.

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux. Silver-only; not part of the 13-col gold backend contract but reattached on the gold output via the M14 column-preservation helper.

name: qc_H
description: EddyPro QC class for H.

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux. Silver-only; reattached on gold output.

name: qc_LE
description: EddyPro QC class for LE.

name: filename
description: EddyPro source filename carried forward from the bronze flux table under the M28/M29 column-accumulation contract.

name: DOY
description: Day of year carried forward from the bronze flux table under the M28/M29 column-accumulation contract.

name: daytime
description: EddyPro daytime indicator carried forward from the bronze flux table under the M28/M29 column-accumulation contract.
